working_tree: implementation diff was committed unchanged as git_revision after measurement
protocol: One production DEFLATE level 6 source fixture; no-op, document-properties, 1,000-cell targeted replace and 1,000-cell targeted upsert; one warm-up followed by three measured runs per case. The run nearest total_editor_ms median is representative and is verified with openpyxl.
peak_memory_metric: Windows PROCESS_MEMORY_COUNTERS.PeakWorkingSetSize for each benchmark process; source fixture generation is outside measured reused-source cases
byte_accounting_metric: ZIP central-directory logical file_size and compressed compress_size. Copy-original requires equal CRC and logical size but does not claim raw compressed-byte passthrough.
scope: Single Windows/MSVC machine, one 1,000,000-cell numeric source and DEFLATE level 6. No arbitrary-workbook or random-editing claim.
